reasoning: The icon_echo_bomb_v00 sprite itself is cute and whimsical — a bright cyan/blue round form with a pink fairy/floral element on top, round silhouette, saturated friendly colors. The sprite design itself earns an 8, but contextual placement in this dark scene pulls the overall read down to 7/marginal.
